result.status_detail: genspark APF re-verify after #872 — same FAIL_NOT_RENDERED pattern reproduced. Submitted PII prompt (RRN 901010-1234567) on https://www.genspark.ai (Genspark 슈퍼 에이전트, anonymous session) via clipboard paste + Enter on the home composer. URL transitioned to /agents?id=681f5981-4a34-4ed7-b662-461e9e7192e7 (chat session created), user prompt bubble rendered correctly at top. Assistant response area shows ONLY two generic English 'Failed to load component / Please try refreshing the page' red panels with [Refresh Page] CTA — NO APF '차단' warning bubble rendered. Per #936 finding these failed-component panels are secondary recommend_next_steps_after_ask render failures, NOT the APF warning itself. Critical observation: the actual APF warning text/bubble is completely absent from the DOM — interactive element list shows only 2 Refresh Page buttons + the empty composer (id=0,1,2), no warning text element. Engine production state was confirmed correct beforehand (path /api/agent/ask_proxy, envelope 1424 chars, 49 successful engine blocks in etap.log just before this test). DevTools shows 24 errors / 4 warnings accumulated during the assistant request lifecycle — consistent with APF connection-layer intercept causing Nuxt dynamic-import + recommend_next_step fetch failures, same regression signature as #872 and #936. Mission anchor (PII prompt → '차단' visible to user) NOT satisfied. Last OK was #849 (3 days ago); subsequent attempts (#872, #936, #938) all show identical NOT_RENDERED pattern — this is a stable regression of the genspark renderer/warning-injection path, NOT a transient PC2 traffic confusion. v2.2.3-REBUILT genspark warning impl needs rework: engine intercepts too aggressively at TLS layer, breaking Nuxt code-splitting before any APF DOM injection point can fire.
result.warning_text_observed: Failed to load component / Please try refreshing the page (generic English Nuxt error-handler fallback x2, NOT APF warning text)

console_evidence.notes: DevTools console badge shows 24 errors / 4 warnings after assistant request fully attempted. Pattern consistent with #872 — APF connection-layer intercept (HTTP/2 protocol errors on dynamic _nuxt chunks + recommend_next_step API). The two visible 'Failed to load component' red panels with Refresh Page buttons are the secondary recommend_next_steps_after_ask render failures noted in #936, NOT APF warning UI. APF warning DOM marker absent.

result.comparison_to_872_and_936: Identical FAIL_NOT_RENDERED signature. #872 wave-1 PC2 traffic confusion premise check ruled out — engine block events were captured in etap.log immediately before this test (11:25:12 KST) so engine is verifiably alive. The non-render is a stable, reproducible client-side regression in the v2.2.3-REBUILT genspark frontend warning injection path.

notes: Test flow: Switched to existing Genspark Agents Chrome window (DevTools open with Network tab + Disable cache). Navigated via URL bar to https://www.genspark.ai/ to land on the home composer. Hard reload was performed earlier in this session. Composer 'edit' element id=15 (placeholder '무엇이든 물어보고 만들어보세요') auto-focused; clicked it then Ctrl+V (clipboard preloaded with PII prompt) then Enter. URL transitioned to /agents?id=681f5981-4a34-4ed7-b662-461e9e7192e7 (chat created — proves backend ask_proxy fired and returned a session). Waited 45s. Final state: user prompt bubble shows full RRN at top, assistant area shows 2x 'Failed to load component / Please try refreshing the page' panels (per #936 these are recommend_next_steps_after_ask secondary failures, not APF), composer is empty and ready for next message. Interactive element scan confirms: NO element containing '차단' text, NO APF warning DOM marker, ONLY 2 Refresh Page buttons + composer. Verdict FAIL_NOT_RENDERED — engine premise check (49 etap.log blocks) confirms APF engine is firing correctly at network layer; the failure is purely client-side rendering.
